agent_output_excerpt:
{
  "executive_summary": "The system faces a capacity crisis within 2-3 months. At 20% month-over-month order growth, PostgreSQL will hit CPU saturation by month 2 and disk exhaustion by month 3. The P99 latency of 800ms and full table scans on order search will degrade to unacceptable levels well before that. The plan prescribes three phases: immediate triage (indexing, read replicas, disk expansion), medium-term restructuring (caching, query optimization, partitioning), and long-term architect
